_nota: PRUEBA v2: apertura ~95s del video de rodillas (remedio casero para el dolor). B-roll puro (sin talking-head). Aplica el pipeline mejorado: anchors→sync_beats (captions_rodillas.json), cámara variada (pan), 12 tipos de componente, 1 clip real de YouTube. Estilo earthy del canal (no el bold de tomateras).

beats.setup: Frota esto en tus rodillas antes de dormir

gen.name: manos_rodilla_crema
gen.prompt: Realistic handheld 16:9 documentary close-up of an older man's weathered hands rubbing a homemade herbal cream onto his bare knee, sitting on a bed at night, warm dim bedside lamp light, muted natural colors, slightly tilted handheld angle, practical documentary look, low-res YouTube screenshot look, not staged, ultra realistic. Negative prompt: studio, cinematic lighting, oversaturated, cartoon, CGI, 3D render, distorted hands, watermark, logo, text.

beats.title: El dolor de rodillas...
items: No es el precio de la edad
No es una condena de por vida

gen.name: rodilla_inflamada
gen.prompt: Realistic handheld 16:9 documentary extreme close-up of an older person's swollen reddened knee joint, slight inflammation visible on the skin, sitting in a plain room, soft natural daylight, muted colors, documentary look, not staged, ultra realistic. Negative prompt: studio, cinematic, oversaturated, cartoon, CGI, 3D, watermark, logo, text.

beats.eyebrow: Qué pasa dentro de la rodilla

gen.name: dg_rodilla_dolor
gen.prompt: Crear una infografía horizontal 16:9, estilo ilustración hecha a mano pero muy profesional, limpia, premium y editorial. Fondo marfil claro con textura de papel sutil, líneas marrón oscuro, acentos verde oliva y terracota apagado. Dejá COMPLETAMENTE LIBRE la esquina superior derecha (limpia, sin texto ni dibujos) para un avatar. Un corte anatómico simple y elegante de una rodilla humana en el centro mostrando 3 problemas con tarjetas suaves y números grandes: 1) INFLAMACIÓN (zona enrojecida), 2) FALTA DE CIRCULACIÓN (vasos sanguíneos estrechos), 3) TEJIDO SIN NUTRICIÓN (cartílago debilitado). Ilustración refinada tipo lámina médica artesanal, texto mínimo en español, flechas elegantes que guían el ojo. Se entiende en 1 segundo. Estética premium editorial, clara, artesanal.

steps.title: Al bajar escaleras
steps.desc: La primera señal, fácil de ignorar

steps.title: Los primeros pasos del día
steps.desc: Antes de que el cuerpo despierte

gen.name: bajar_escaleras
gen.prompt: Realistic handheld 16:9 documentary photo of an older man carefully going down a staircase at home holding the railing, slight grimace, soft indoor daylight, muted colors, documentary look, not staged, ultra realistic. Negative prompt: studio, cinematic, oversaturated, cartoon, CGI, 3D, distorted hands, watermark, logo, text.

gen.name: consulta_medico
gen.prompt: Realistic handheld 16:9 documentary photo of an older man sitting across a desk from a doctor in a plain clinic office, doctor in white coat writing, neutral fluorescent lighting, muted colors, documentary look, not staged, ultra realistic. Negative prompt: studio, cinematic, oversaturated, cartoon, CGI, 3D, perfect symmetrical face, watermark, logo, text.

gen.name: diclofenaco_caja
gen.prompt: Realistic handheld 16:9 documentary macro of a weathered hand holding a generic white and blue box of anti-inflammatory pills and a blister pack on a kitchen table, plain home background, soft daylight, muted colors, documentary look, not staged, ultra realistic. Negative prompt: studio, cinematic, oversaturated, cartoon, CGI, 3D, fake brand names, distorted hands, watermark, logo, text.

beats.text: Funcionaba mientras lo tomaba. Lo dejaba y el dolor *volvía*.

gen.name: estomago_dolor
gen.prompt: Realistic handheld 16:9 documentary photo of an older man sitting on a couch with a pained expression holding his stomach with both hands, plain living room, soft daylight, muted colors, documentary look, not staged, ultra realistic. Negative prompt: studio, cinematic, oversaturated, cartoon, CGI, 3D, perfect symmetrical face, distorted hands, watermark, logo, text.

beats.anchor: el dolor de estómago por el remedio

gen.name: gente_mayor
gen.prompt: Realistic handheld 16:9 documentary photo of a group of older people sitting on a park bench, one rubbing his knee, everyday casual scene, soft overcast daylight, muted colors, documentary look, not staged, ultra realistic. Negative prompt: studio, cinematic, oversaturated, cartoon, CGI, 3D, perfect symmetrical faces, watermark, logo, text.
